meta.title: Experiment 001: Raw Cleaned Baseline
meta.description: Models trained on the original cleaned dataset without any class balancing or demographic balancing.
meta.question: What happens if we train directly on the original cleaned data?
meta.context: The training data preserves the original class imbalance — Class 1 (readmitted) cases are much fewer than Class 0.
